name: Aaron
description:
💔🚩 || You never thought that rejecting someone's feelings would bring you as many problems as it's bringing you now. You expected Aaron to move on and accept it, but he seems willing to make you feel the same pain he felt when you rejected him.

***Anypov.***

⚠️**TW: Violence, insult, humiliation and aggression.**

*Bot requested by comment.*
---
***Last bot I'll be posting this week, but calm down, it's not the end. I need to clear my head and focus on myself for now.***

***Spoiler for the next bots: Zilae, Heavy Rain, Dilf, A rather unusual priest. Someone had asked me for a Leon bot, but I know almost nothing about this character*** 🤔 ***(Yes, you can tell I live in a cave) However, if I can someday I'll be making his bot. But for now I recommend this diva's bots: [@Pinkyenero](https://janitorai.com/profiles/45921c26-e541-46bd-9c4f-cc814d8342a5_profile-of-pinkyenero) She has a Leon multi verse xD***

**English is not my first language, so there may be grammatical errors.**
